dashboard.label: Target Risk Scoring
dashboard.description: Calculate risk scores for targeted hosts based on alert severity and frequency.

search.query: | inputlookup suricata_settings.csv | stats latest(eval(if(setting="search_scope", value, null()))) as search_scope latest(eval(if(setting="time_choice", value, null()))) as time_choice | eval search_scope=coalesce(search_scope, "index=suricata") | eval time_choice=coalesce(time_choice, "24h") | eval earliest_tok=case(time_choice=="7d", "-7d@d", time_choice=="30d", "-30d@d", time_choice=="all", "0", true(), "-24h@h") | eval latest_tok="now"

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval severity = coalesce('alert.severity', alert.severity, severity) | eval risk_score = if(severity=="1", 10, if(severity=="2", 7, if(severity=="3", 4, 1))) | stats count as alert_count sum(risk_score) as total_risk avg(risk_score) as avg_risk by dest_ip | eval avg_risk = round(avg_risk, 2) | eval threat_level = if(avg_risk >= 8, "Critical", if(avg_risk >= 5, "High", if(avg_risk >= 3, "Medium", "Low"))) | sort - total_risk | head 10

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval severity = coalesce('alert.severity', alert.severity, severity) | eval risk_score = if(severity=="1", 10, if(severity=="2", 7, if(severity=="3", 4, 1))) | eval threat_level = if(risk_score >= 8, "Critical", if(risk_score >= 5, "High", if(risk_score >= 3, "Medium", "Low"))) | stats count by threat_level

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval severity = coalesce('alert.severity', alert.severity, severity) | eval risk_score = if(severity=="1", 10, if(severity=="2", 7, if(severity=="3", 4, 1))) | timechart span=1h sum(risk_score) as total_risk
